works.title: Guillem Poy's Web Portfolio
description: My personal web portfolio. It showcases my projects and skills.

works.title: WikiPoll
description: A web app that allows users to create and vote on polls. It's a fun way to learn new things and share opinions.
This project was created as part of the freeCodeCamp curriculum.
